svg.title: Object Diagram: Patient Reports Symptoms and AI Analyzes

g.text: Object Diagram: Patient Reports Symptoms and AI Analyzes
Patient Lisa Wong reports skin rash symptoms.
AI assistant analyzes symptoms and suggests dermatology specialization.
Patient, conversation, AI messages, symptom analysis
Content = "I have a red, itchy rash on my arms that started 3 days ago. It's getting worse and spreading."
Content = "I understand you have a skin rash. Can you describe the exact location, size, and any other symptoms?"
Content = "It's on both arms, about 5cm patches. Very itchy, red, slightly raised. No fever."
Content = "Based on your symptoms (bilateral arm rash, itching, redness), I recommend consulting a dermatologist. This could be contact dermatitis or an allergic reaction."
